title: Boundedness of variation operators associated with the heat semigroup generated by high order Schrödinger type operators
abstract: In this paper, we derive the $L^p$-boundedness of the variation operators associated with the heat semigroup which is generated by the high order Schrödinger type operator $(-Δ)^2+V^2$. Further more, we prove the boundedness of the variation operators on Morrey spaces. In the proof of the main results, we always make use of the variation inequalities associated with the heat semigroup generated by the biharmonic operator $(-Δ)^2.$
